sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Cicero, M. Tullius</hi> Orator et Philosophus [Cic.] <date TEIform="date">i B.C.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">Acad. = Academica,</title_> ed. O. Plasberg, Leipzig (T.) 1922. <title_ TEIform="title">Att. = Epistulae ad Atticum,</title_> ed. L. C. Purser, Oxford (OCT). <title_ TEIform="title">Brut. = Brutus.</title_> ed. A. S. Wilkins, Oxford (OCT). <title_ TEIform="title">Fam. = Epistulae ad Familiares,</title_> ed. L. C. Purser, Oxford (OCT). <title_ TEIform="title">Fin. = de Finibus,</title_> ed. T. Schiche, Leipzig (T.) 1915. <title_ TEIform="title">ND = de Natura Deorum,</title_> ed. O. Plasberg, Leipzig (T.) 1917. <title_ TEIform="title">Off. = de Officiis,</title_> ed. C. Atzert, Leipzig (T.) 1923. <title_ TEIform="title">Orat. = Oralor,</title_> ed. A. S. Wilkins, Oxford (OCT). <title_ TEIform="title">QF = Epistulae ad Quintum Fratrem,</title_> ed. L. C. Purser, Oxford (OCT). <title_ TEIform="title">Top. = Topica,</title_> ed. W. Friedrich, Leipzig (T.) 1893. <title_ TEIform="title">Tusc. = Tusculanae Disputationes,</title_> ed. M.
